title: 90% of retailers are using AI. Far fewer are ready to run it at scale
description: Most retailers invest in AI, but few see results. This piece shows why success depends on store-level execution—and what’s needed at the edge to drive impact.

title: Agentic AI is rewriting the rules of value and monetization in commerce media
description: Koddi’s new data shows a market already in motion and provides clues about who stands to win.

title: WTF is vector-based ad targeting?
description: Traditional text-based ad targeting will always have its place. But in an ad marketplace run by AI agents, it may need to be replaced as the primary method of aiming ads.

title: Media Buying Briefing: Breaking down Coca-Cola’s campaign blitz with an eye toward its review
description: Reading the tea leaves of Coca-Cola’s recent campaigns (and their media spending) reveals its priorities ahead of a huge media and data account review.

title: Crocs CMO Carly Gomez is all about Labubu dolls, fashion Substacks and a drawer full of socks
description: In the latest installment of "What's in Your Cart," the CMO of Crocs, Carly Gomez, shares her personal shopping habits with Modern Retail.

title: Utah and Idaho have become key growth markets for Target, Kroger
description: As a result of rapid population and housing growth in Utah and Idaho, major retail chains are opening new stores in the region, in cities they once may have glanced over.

title: Prime Day Has Remade the Retail Calendar
description:
Walmart, Target, Best Buy, warehouse clubs, apparel chains, home improvement stores, and countless direct-to-consumer brands have launched similar promotions.
The post Prime Day Has Remade the Retail Calendar appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: KFC’s brand evolution looks to set the standard for fried chicken QSRs
description: Global CMO Valerie Kubizniak digs into plans that include a visual refresh as the chain works to reassert itself in a category it created.

title: Digiday Scorecard: As competition between DSPs heats up, buyers rank market rivals
description: Media buyers explain how they compare DSPs on transparency, inventory and performance. The best of the lot? Take a look.

title: The AI layoff wave is becoming a powder keg
description: What makes this combustible: at the very moment that tens of thousands of workers are being shown the door, a small cohort of AI insiders is becoming wealthy on a scale that's hard to comprehend.

title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
description: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
description: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

title: What B2B Professionals Really Think About AI in 2026
description: New research from SmarterX surfaced not just where B2B professionals are in their AI journey but how they feel about it.

title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
description: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.

title: Pinterest bets on creators with Amazon Storefront integration
description: Pinterest is adding support for Amazon Storefronts, allowing creators to earn affiliate commissions more easily while showcasing their product recommendations in one place.
